data.title: Buy Rating on Generate Biomedicines Driven by Differentiated Pipeline, GB-0895 Asthma Opportunity, and AI-Enabled Protein Platform
data.description:
In a report released yesterday, Salveen Richter from Goldman Sachs maintained a Buy rating on Generate Biomedicines, Inc., with a price target of $26.00.

Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Salveen Richter has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors tied to Generate Biomedicines’ differentiated pipeline and platform. He underscores the lead antibody GB-0895, which is designed for twice‑yearly dosing in severe asthma, as potentially matching the efficacy of existing TSLP inhibitors while offering a meaningfully more convenient regimen that could support future market share gains.

He also points to upcoming catalysts, including near‑term GB-0895 COPD data that may enable a streamlined, single‑dose Phase 3 design, and mid‑term readouts from GB-4362 that could enhance the profile of established ADC regimens. Alongside these assets, he notes the company’s generative AI‑driven protein engineering platform and existing big‑pharma alliances as sources of both scientific leverage and non‑dilutive funding, reinforcing the Buy recommendation.

Richter covers the Healthcare sector, focusing on stocks such as Alnylam Pharma, Biogen, and Gilead Sciences. According to TipRanks, Richter has an average return of 10.8% and a 46.85% success rate on recommended stocks.
